note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

first.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

middle.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

last.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

street_or_po_box_number.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

city_or_town.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

state.guidance: A US state — 'Maine' or the 2-letter 'ME'; match the box width.

town.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

county.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

ft_in.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

lbs.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

color.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

color_2.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.
